title: UAE slams Bloomberg over ‘inaccurate’ air defence report amid US–Israel war on Iran
summary_full: The UAE has strongly refuted a Bloomberg report questioning its air defence capabilities, calling the claims false and misleading.  Asserting its possession of diverse, multi-layered systems and robust munitions, the ministry stressed its unwavering operational readiness. This strong rebuttal highlights the nation's commitment to controlling its security narrative amidst regional tensions and calls for responsible journalism.
